name: GT Singer
label_fit: Strong fit for breathy, glissando, mixed voice, falsetto, pharyngeal, vibrato, and control.
main_gap: High-quality studio singing; not representative of everyday app recordings.

name: VocalSet
label_fit: Useful controlled vocal techniques and exercises.
main_gap: Professional/controlled singers and exercises, not user-uploaded songs.

name: Automatic Vocal Mode Classification Dataset
label_fit: CVT modes Neutral, Curbing, Overdrive, and Edge; useful if we add broader voice-mode detection.
main_gap: Sustained vowels and CVT taxonomy do not map one-to-one to GT Singer technique classes.

name: Singing Voice Quality and Technique Database
label_fit: Annotated vocal-pedagogy attributes including vibrato-related quality signals.
main_gap: Classical tenor repertoire only; not casual app-user singing.

name: DAMP-S-AG
label_fit: Excellent match for real-world mobile karaoke audio.
main_gap: No technique labels; research license constraints.

name: CCMusic Acapella Evaluation Dataset
label_fit: Expert scores for pitch, rhythm, vocal range, timbre, pronunciation, vibrato, dynamics, breath control, and overall performance.
main_gap: Quality scoring source, not a direct technique-detector training set.

name: NanoPitch App Recordings
label_fit: Best source for the real product objective when labeled by coach/reviewer.
main_gap: Needs collection, consent, storage policy, and annotation workflow.
